description: A guest who checked out yesterday calls to report they may have left a phone charger in their room.

nodes.task_description: Identify the caller and the room they stayed in.

expected_outcome.value: Agent confirms the guest's previous stay details.

nodes.task_description: Check the digital lost and found log for any items found in that room.

expected_outcome.value: Agent searches the log and finds an entry for a 'white iPhone charger' found in that room.

nodes.task_description: Confirm the item with the guest and arrange for it to be mailed to their home address.

expected_outcome.value: Agent confirms the item belongs to the guest and processes a shipping request.
